definition.allowed: published printing + alternative art (duplicate_of or fingerprint-merged reprint of same mechanics)
definition.excluded: promo front/back/signatures (98***/99***, pack_code=promo) and parallel front/back/signatures (900** signature alts, separate parallel investigator tuples)
definition.signatures: each OR-group: exactly one printing from allowed set (non-promo, non-parallel, plus duplicate_of reprints)
